## Calculations.scaleConfection() function

Scales any confection, automatically choosing the appropriate method.

For molded bonbons, if frameCount and cavitiesPerMold are provided, uses frame-based scaling. Otherwise, uses linear scaling by factor.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function scaleConfection<T extends ConfectionData>(confection: T, factor: number, options?: IConfectionScaleOptions): Result<IScaledConfection<T>>;
```
